story.text:
# 📜 Federation Log

Chronological, append-only (the LLM-Wiki `log.md`). Greppable on disk: `grep "^## \[" ~/.wiki/skill-fedwiki/log.md`. Newest last.

## [2026-06-27] sync | skills → skill.guide.agentprivacy.ai (163 skills + hubs; the proven pattern)
## [2026-06-27] ingest | Tomes & cast → tomes.guide.agentprivacy.ai (121 pages; Phase 1 template)
## [2026-06-27] ingest | Research & conjectures → research.guide.agentprivacy.ai (C1–C89 + PVM v6)
## [2026-06-27] ingest | Spellweb graph → atlas.guide.agentprivacy.ai (660 nodes, 1607 edges backbone)
## [2026-06-27] lint | coverage audit — leak fixed (3 chronicle nodes sealed); gaps mapped
## [2026-06-27] ingest | agentprivacy-docs deep pass → research.guide.agentprivacy.ai (143; +ceremonies/reference/papers/grimoires/compendium)
## [2026-06-27] ingest | City extras + spellweb canon + master guides (tomes 150 · atlas 696 · guide 14)
## [2026-06-27] sync | bound the 5 sites into a family (roster) + live federationmap on welcome
## [2026-06-27] lint | forkback.js (G7) fork-back gate demonstrated end-to-end
## [2026-06-27] ingest | LLM-Wiki pattern essay → wikis/agentprivacy-wiki-llm-knowledge-base (mapped to the federation)
## [2026-06-27] note | Governing an LLM-Wiki: the eight gates → notes/note-governing-an-llm-wiki-the-eight-gates.md
## [2026-06-27] sync | fully realised the LLM-Wiki pattern: log.js + file-answer.js + build-guide-extras (Federation Log + The Notes live on guide)
## [2026-06-27] ingest | Grimoires + Selene's Spellbook → grimoire.guide.agentprivacy.ai (127: 70 spells, 18 incantations, 17 vertices, 14 poems, proverbs/blades/principles)
## [2026-06-27] lint | audit WARN — 1515 pages · broken 11 · xref-broken 0 · 6 leak-candidates · 1 orphans
## [2026-06-27] lint | audit WARN — 1519 pages · broken 10 · xref-broken 0 · 6 leak-candidates · 2 orphans
## [2026-06-27] lint | audit WARN — 1520 pages · broken 10 · xref-broken 0 · 6 leak-candidates · 1 orphans
## [2026-06-27] gap-closed | spellweb conjectures C1-C17 → 4 group nodes + 7 edges; atlas 700
## [2026-06-28] note | built agentprivacy-wiki-resync skill (the lint+resync per-turn op)
## [2026-06-28] lint | audit WARN — 1521 pages · broken 12 · xref-broken 0 · 6 leak-candidates · 1 orphans
## [2026-06-28] lint | audit WARN — 1521 pages · broken 12 · xref-broken 0 · 6 leak-candidates · 1 orphans
## [2026-06-27] sync | new skill agentprivacy-wiki-resync→skill.guide.agentprivacy.ai; master reference (onboarding 3 + system-ref 8)→guide 17→31
## [2026-06-27] add | The Model formal hub → research.guide.agentprivacy.ai/the-model (mirror of /model); blog links fixed → sync.soulbis.com/s/privacy-is-value Substack
## [2026-06-27] add | Artefacts spine → tomes: 64 artefact pages (0 Null + 1-63 blades) + The Artefacts hub; the long-term forge home (workshops assign items to vertices); tomes 166→231
## [2026-06-27] chronicle | Federation close-out: The Artefacts + what remains → agentprivacy_master/docs/chronicles/2026-06-28_federation_closeout_artefacts_and_what_remains.md
